title: Few queries around Updates GraphQL API
excerpt:
Hi, 
I wanted to check if there is any API for below operations 


Query the updates with filter on these fields :  Board Id, Item Id, Created at,updated_at, creator 


Query the Like, Seen details. currently we see only…

posts.author: TechOpsHub (Tech OpsHub)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I wanted to check if there is any API for below operations

  1. Query the updates with filter on these fields : Board Id, Item Id, Created at,updated_at, creator

  2. Query the Like, Seen details. currently we see only possibility to query updates and its reply.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TechOpsHub!

Yes at this time, the only “filters” or arguments, you’re able to apply to Updates are “limit” and “page.”

image1410×516 29 KB

I’m moving this to our “Feature Requests” section and submitting this as feedback!

Thanks~
